pages.text:
Paria, 24 Mared 1970

The Right Honourable

Miniater of Asticulture and canoporativas of the Government of HALATSIA.

svettentan doa,.

KUALA LUREPUR

81X,

I save the honour to acknonledge your letter Rel. M.A. 1176-(35)

BULII of the 19ch of March.

Thia latter confirma your foraal application for meaberahip to

ibe OTTICE INTERNATIOMAL DES IPIZOOTIES, on beball of HALATSIA.

Our Orgenization le happy to velcome your Country.

I bave teken note that MALATBIA visher ta basone a full sunber

In the sizel category of our Maaber-countries.

The tato of the annual contribution of your country tor the year

1970 16 Pranch Prance 6,177,20 (aix tbousand seven hundred parenty seven

Pranes, tranty centtons).

i underetend elso that the Director al Tererinary Bervicos,

: MALATEIA, v111 be appottited as the permanent Delagato

to the O.I.J. Committoe.

With highest estant and consideration.

I du, Your Bxcellency'a obedient darvant,

Dr. I. VITTOR,

Diractor, O.I. I.
